memberdef.name: AWGN_getset
AWGNObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "source.AWGN", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(AWGNObject), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)AWGNObj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "Create an AWGN generator.\n", .tp_methods = AWGNObj_methods, .tp_getset = AWGN_getset, .tp_new = AWGNObj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)AWGNObj_init, }
